events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a missing seal-off fitting at a boundary in classified-area wiring. NEC 500-516 covers wiring methods in classified (hazardous) locations. Seal-offs are required at boundaries of classified areas to prevent the passage of gases/vapors. Missing seal-off fitting = non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical (classified area, explosion hazard). Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective.
